title: GLO compensation scheme: progress reports for 2024
body: "This page contains independent reports, written by Dentons, for the Group Litigation Order (GLO) Compensation Scheme.  The reports explain how claims are progressing through the GLO scheme.  From 30 September 2025, independent reports produced by Dentons will cover the Horizon Convictions Redress Scheme (HCRS) and Horizon Shortfall Scheme Appeals (HSSA) process, as well as the GLO scheme.  Information about amounts paid out for all Horizon schemes is available separately on GOV.UK.  "
